title: Syub Snunb

'''Syub Snunb''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] military [[Officer/Legends|officer]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Biography==
Snunb began his military career as a security chief of several cargo barges in the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation's]] merchant navy, eventually transferring to the [[Sullustan Home Guard/Legends|Sullustan Home Guard]]. He proved effective in the Home Guard, and was second only to the [[Home Guard Commodore]]. He was largely apolitical, following whatever dictates SoroSuub passed down.

Following the successful overthrow of [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust's]] pro-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ''junta'' and the subsequent alignment of Sullust with the Rebel Alliance, Snunb was selected to meet the [[Rebel Command Fleet]] at [[Obica]] and lead it to Sullust, which was used as the gathering point before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. As a sign of good faith, they gave him command of ''[[Antares Six]]''.

He remained in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]], where he gained a reputation for running an efficient ship. In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]] led ''Antares Six'' into the [[Second Battle of Coruscant]] to rescue the stranded crew of [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Liberator'']]. He was the first to spot the [[Force storm (wormhole)|Force storm]] that disrupted the battle and transported [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to [[Byss/Legends|Byss]].

As a [[Commander/Legends|Commander]], he was selected as an inaugural officer of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|New Republic Fifth Battle Group]], serving as commanding officer of the modified [[Nebula-class Star Destroyer|''Nebula''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Resolve (New Republic Star Destroyer)|''Resolve'']].

==Behind the scenes==
Included in Snunb's [[Sullustese/Legends|Sullustese]] dialog in ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]'' are the words "Eihcra Niwdoog," which is the name of celebrated [[Star Wars (comic strip)|''Star Wars'' comic strip]] and [[Marvel Comics]] author [[Archie Goodwin]] spelled backwards.

"Syub" is a male Sullustan name meaning "industrious" and "Snunb" is a female Sullustan name meaning "popular."<ref name="GCG">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>
